fields.summary: Support doas parameter at rest api of yarn-service

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
user can submit application of yarn-service with a more user-friendly web-ui than RM UI2
web-ui need proxy user privileges and the web-ui must be able to submit jobs as an end user.

REST API of yarn-service need to doas function.

resolution.description: The problem is a duplicate of an existing issue.
resolution.name: Duplicate

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

This message was automatically generated.

[~magnum] Thank you for the patch.  However, this feature is already supported, there is no need to duplicate web impersonation logic in YARN service api.  In core-site.xml, set:

{code}
    <property>
      <name>hadoop.http.filter.initializers</name>
      <value>org.apache.hadoop.security.authentication.server.ProxyUserAuthenticationFilterInitializer,org.apache.hadoop.security.HttpCrossOriginFilterInitializer</value>
    </property>
{code}

This will enable web impersonation globally to all web end points.
